policy.record_rule: This registry stores source definitions only. It must not be treated as verified scholarship rows.
policy.row_rule: A scholarship row needs a source URL, source type, confidence mode, last_seen_at, and last_verified_at before it can be public.
policy.copy_rule: Do not use any scholarship-count copy above the live API active verified or explicitly curated record count.

sources.name: AfroTools scholarship catalog import
